isc.criterion: Exports a debounce(fn, wait) function returning a debounced callable
isc.evidence: src/util/debounce.ts:2 exports debounce returning the `debounced` closure

isc.criterion: Debounced callable exposes .cancel() that prevents a pending call
isc.evidence: debounce.ts: debounced.cancel clears the timer and nulls lastArgs

isc.criterion: Debounced callable exposes .flush() that invokes immediately if pending
isc.evidence: debounce.ts: debounced.flush clears timer then calls fn with lastArgs

isc.criterion: Unit tests cover trailing call, cancel, and flush behaviours
isc.evidence: debounce.test.ts has three tests for trailing/cancel/flush

summary: Clean, fully typed, generic debounce with cancel/flush and matching tests. Reference-quality.
